'''竏營-dh-z-j''' ('''kazadhzejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outachieve|outachieve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outachieve|outachieve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-dh-z-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazadhzejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadhzejoko|thizadhzejoko]] || [[word:jizadhzejoko|jizadhzejoko]] || [[word:shizadhzejoko|shizadhzejoko]] || [[word:kizadhzejoko|kizadhzejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzadhzejoko|thuthuzadhzejoko]] || [[word:jujuzadhzejoko|jujuzadhzejoko]] || [[word:shushuzadhzejoko|shushuzadhzejoko]] || [[word:kukuzadhzejoko|kukuzadhzejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzadhzejoko|thuzadhzejoko]] || [[word:juzadhzejoko|juzadhzejoko]] || [[word:shuzadhzejoko|shuzadhzejoko]] || [[word:kuzadhzejoko|kuzadhzejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzadhzejoko|thuzadhzejoko]] || [[word:juzadhzejoko|juzadhzejoko]] || [[word:shuzadhzejoko|shuzadhzejoko]] || [[word:kuzadhzejoko|kuzadhzejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezadhzejoko|thezadhzejoko]] || [[word:jezadhzejoko|jezadhzejoko]] || [[word:shezadhzejoko|shezadhzejoko]] || [[word:kezadhzejoko|kezadhzejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozadhzejoko|thozadhzejoko]] || [[word:jozadhzejoko|jozadhzejoko]] || [[word:shozadhzejoko|shozadhzejoko]] || [[word:kozadhzejoko|kozadhzejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozadhzejoko|thozadhzejoko]] || [[word:jozadhzejoko|jozadhzejoko]] || [[word:shozadhzejoko|shozadhzejoko]] || [[word:kozadhzejoko|kozadhzejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzadhzejoko|thﾃｦzadhzejoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦzadhzejoko|jﾃｦzadhzejoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦzadhzejoko|shﾃｦzadhzejoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦzadhzejoko|kﾃｦzadhzejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazadhzejoko|thathazadhzejoko]] || [[word:jajazadhzejoko|jajazadhzejoko]] || [[word:shashazadhzejoko|shashazadhzejoko]] || [[word:kakazadhzejoko|kakazadhzejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazadhzejoko|thazadhzejoko]] || [[word:jazadhzejoko|jazadhzejoko]] || [[word:shazadhzejoko|shazadhzejoko]] || [[word:kazadhzejoko|kazadhzejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazadhzejoko|thazadhzejoko]] || [[word:jazadhzejoko|jazadhzejoko]] || [[word:shazadhzejoko|shazadhzejoko]] || [[word:kazadhzejoko|kazadhzejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazadhzejithi|shazadhzejithi]] || [[word:shazadhzejiji|shazadhzejiji]] || [[word:shazadhzejishi|shazadhzejishi]] || [[word:shazadhzejiki|shazadhzejiki]]
